LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 24, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. DEFENDANT SHALL GIVE NOTICE OF THE NEW HEARING DATE AND ALSO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A COURTESY COPY OF ITS OPPOSITION NO LATER THAN MONDAY, JANUARY 14. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES - THE MOTION IS GRANTED TO THE EXTENT THAT THE COURT AWARDS A TOTAL OF $1500 AS REASONABLE FEES. THE FEES WERE REDUCED BECAUSE COUNSEL'S DECLARATION STATES THAT HE PREPARED "PLAINTIFF'S WRIT OF ATTACHMENT, DRAFT MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DRAFT DECLARATIONS, FINALIZE, FILE AND SERVE," (PARA. 9) AND THAT HE "PREPARED DEFAULT JUDGMENT PAPERS, INCLUDING INTEREST DECLARATION, COST DECLARATION, SUPPORTING AFFIDAVIT IN LIEU OF TESTIMONY; ASSEMBLY OF EXHIBITS; PREPARATION OF DOE DISMISSAL; JUDGMENT AND OTHER DOCUMENTS NECESSARY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULES TO ESTABLISH THE RIGHT TO A DEFAULT JUDGMENT; PREPARATION AND SERVICE OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT"(PARA 10). HOWEVER, THE COURT'S REGISTER OF ACTIONS DO NOT REFLECT THESE EVENTS OCCURRED IN THIS CASE. FURTHER, $640 IN DISCOVERY SANCTIONS ARE ALREADY REFLECTED IN THE STIPULATED JUDGMENT FILED OCTOBER 22, 2012, YET $600 IN ATTORNEY FEES ARE REQUESTED ON THE INVOICE SUBMITTED IN CONNECTION WITH THIS MOTION. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Award Of Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Feb-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'s Motion For Award Of Attorney'S Fees - The motion is granted to the extent that the Court awards a total of $1500 as reasonable fees. The fees were reduced because counsel's declaration states that he prepared "plaintiff's writ of attachment, draft memorandum of points and authorities, draft declarations, finalize, file and serve," (para. 9) and that he "prepared default judgment papers, including interest declaration, cost declaration, supporting affidavit in lieu of testimony; assembly of exhibits; preparation of Doe dismissal; judgment and other documents necessary to comply with Local Rules to establish the right to a default judgment; preparation and service of case management statement"(para 10). However, the Court's register of actions do not reflect these events occurred in this case. Further, $640 in discovery sanctions are already reflected in the Stipulated Judgment filed October 22, 2012, yet $600 in attorney fees are requested on the invoice submitted in connection with this motion. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Award Of Attorney'S Fees

No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. For good cause shown, the court allowed the late-filed opposition and vacated its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Motion For Award Of Attorney's Fees is continued to January 24, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Defendant shall give notice of the new hearing date and also provide the court with a courtesy copy of its opposition no later than Monday, January 14. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077.
